task_completion.description: Verify that the title of 'Scan_2024_001' has been changed to include 'Invoice' and 'Global Logistics'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a document view, edit form, or workspace list showing the document originally named 'Scan_2024_001' now titled 'Invoice - Global Logistics' (or similar containing both keywords).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Nature' metadata field for 'Scan_2024_001' is set to 'Invoice' (or 'bill').
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the metadata section or edit form of the first document showing the 'Nature' dropdown or field selected as 'Invoice' (or 'bill').

task_completion.description: Verify that the title of 'Scan_2024_002' has been changed to include 'NDA' and 'StartUp Dynamics'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a document view, edit form, or workspace list showing the document originally named 'Scan_2024_002' now titled 'NDA - StartUp Dynamics' (or similar containing both keywords).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Nature' metadata field for 'Scan_2024_002' is set to 'Contract'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the metadata section or edit form of the second document showing the 'Nature' dropdown or field selected as 'Contract'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the changes to both documents have been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a confirmation message (e.g., 'Document modified'), or the final 'Incoming Scans' workspace view displaying the updated document titles and metadata without any unsaved edit forms open.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Nuxeo web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the Nuxeo ECM platform in a web browser, rather than terminal commands, curl requests, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened or previewed the documents to extract the vendor/partner names.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots where the actual content of 'Scan_2024_001' and 'Scan_2024_002' is visible in the browser's document previewer.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application's edit forms to change metadata.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Nuxeo document edit screens being used to modify the title and nature, rather than text editors or browser developer console manipulations.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Document 1 ('Scan_2024_001') is an invoice from 'Global Logistics Inc'. The expected title must contain 'Invoice' and 'Global Logistics'. The expected Nature metadata is 'Invoice' (or 'bill'). Document 2 ('Scan_2024_002') is an NDA with 'StartUp Dynamics'. The expected title must contain 'NDA' and 'StartUp Dynamics'.
